evidence.claim: The system allows closing a runway.
evidence.fact: The system allows a runway to be closed.
evidence.fact_span: The system allows a runway to be closed.

evidence.claim: The system reassigns flights to other runways when a runway is closed.
evidence.fact: When a runway is closed, the system automatically reassigns its future flights to the other runway.
evidence.user_story_span: close a runway and reassign flights
evidence.fact_span: When a runway is closed, the system automatically reassigns its future flights to the other runway.

evidence.fact: This scheduling platform coordinates the movement of aircraft on and off two parallel runways.
evidence.user_story_span: manages runway assignments and flight schedules

evidence.fact: The system prevents overlapping assignments on the same runway.
evidence.fact_span: The system prevents overlapping assignments on the same runway.

evidence.claim: The system marks flights as delayed if the delay exceeds 60 minutes.
evidence.fact: The system marks flights as delayed if they cannot be placed within 60 minutes of their estimated time.
evidence.user_story_span: mark flights as delayed if the delay exceeds 60 minutes
evidence.fact_span: The system marks flights as delayed if they cannot be placed within 60 minutes of their estimated time.

evidence.claim: Delay is calculated from original scheduled departure or arrival time.
evidence.fact: The system allocates slots at or after the flight's estimated time.
evidence.user_story_span: Delay is calculated from original scheduled departure or arrival time.
evidence.fact_span: The system allocates slots at or after the flight's estimated time.
